title: Fit test - 2nd screen "X" button
scenario: Fit Test results screen closes and returns to Device Settings when tapping the X button
steps: Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings
Locate and tap on Fit Test option
Complete the Fit Test process to reach the Fit Test results screen
Tap the 'X' button on the Fit Test results screen
expected: The Fit Test results screen closes and the user is returned to Device Settings.
